sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62900" key="lhmatia/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λημᾰτ-ιάω</orth>, <sense id="n62900.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be high-spirited</tr_>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. in</abbr> Ar.l.c.</sense> </entryFree>
